cloudwatch.alarm.dimension.CfnAbout: Dimension is an embedded property of the `AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm` type. Dimensions are name/value pairs that can be associated with a CloudWatch metric. You can specify a maximum of 10 dimensions for a given metric.

cloudwatch.alarm.dimension.Name.Description: The name of the dimension, from 1–255 characters in length. This dimension name must have been included when the metric was published.

cloudwatch.alarm.dimension.Value.Description: The value for the dimension, from 1–255 characters in length.
